original: The nuka tech-scavenger fires off a line of concentrated aphrodisiac gel.
Luckily your airtight outfit prevents any effects from the chemical spray.
The nuka woman raises her laser pistol, firing off several blasts of energy in your direction.
The nuka woman raises a hand toward you, and you feel the air around you begin to grow thicker.
textify(r||(r=(0,y.Z)(["You shrug off the effects of her psionic attack, resisting them entirely."])))
textify(u||(u=(0,y.Z)(["You fail to resist the psychic attack, and all your reactions slow to a halt."])))
The tainted nuka deactivates her hardlight covering for a second, and two long tongues darts forth from her lipples.
textify(h||(h=(0,y.Z)(["You deftly avoid the twin barrage of tongues."])))
textify(c||(c=(0,y.Z)(["The tongues smack into your body in a rapid double hit. The blows are much more powerful than they seem, and rock you back."])))

The tainted nuka deactivates her hardlight top, letting her bouncy breasts fall free. A long tongue snakes out of one of them and twists around one of her wrists in a licentious coil. She squirts a jet from her sprayer that coats the tongue, hissing at the sudden rush of pleasure. Then, the tongue suddenly disentangles and whips toward you.
textify(g||(g=(0,y.Z)(["You deftly avoid the aphrodisiac-laced tongue."])))

textify(p||(p=(0,y.Z)(["The tongue slams into your body, and ","."])),t?"while your suit stops the aphrodisiac attack, the blow still hurts":"in addition to the physical blow a heavy dose of aphrodisiac splashes onto your body")
